content.name: AI Influence
content.description: LLM-driven faction representatives you can talk to. Conversations route through the Neural Link bridge to a local LLM; validated actions feed back into the live X4 world.
content.author: Moshine

text.name: AI Influence
text.description: LLM-driven faction representatives you can talk to. Conversations route through the Neural Link bridge to a local LLM; validated actions feed back into the live X4 world.
text.author: Moshine
